sprints.title: AgentForge v6.5.0 — Autonomous Command Center UI

items.title: Cycles history browser — /cycles route
items.description: New /cycles route in the SvelteKit dashboard listing all past autonomous cycles with status badges, timestamps, and score summaries. Reads from .agentforge/cycles/*. Auto-refreshes every 10s. Commits: 350a53c, c958df5.

items.title: Cycle detail page — /cycles/[id] with 5 tabs
items.description: Detail page at /cycles/[id] with Overview, Scoring, Events, Phases, and Files tabs. Connects to GET /api/v5/cycles/:id and sub-resource endpoints. Commits: 5f16b8c, e7e7e75.

items.title: Cycle launcher — /cycles/new with 6-stage live progress
items.description: New /cycles/new page that lets operators launch an autonomous cycle from the browser. Shows a 6-stage progress indicator (plan → stage → run → verify → commit → review) that updates via SSE as the cycle advances. Commit: b5eec7f.

items.title: Sprint kanban view
items.description: Kanban board view on the sprints page showing items grouped by status (planned / in_progress / completed / failed) with drag-free visual grouping.

items.title: Autonomous nav section in sidebar
items.description: New 'Autonomous' navigation section in the SvelteKit sidebar grouping cycles, runner, and approvals links for the autonomous loop operator workflow.

items.title: Home page hero + recent cycles widget
items.description: Updated dashboard home page with an autonomous loop hero section and a recent cycles widget pulling the latest 5 cycle records.

successCriteria: /cycles lists all past autonomous cycles with correct status and metadata
/cycles/[id] shows 5-tab detail with real cycle data
/cycles/new launches a real cycle and shows live 6-stage progress
Sprint kanban view renders items by status column
Autonomous nav section visible in sidebar
All 247 autonomous tests continue to pass
